message:
build: pin fastapi_rust deps to exact rev, update asupersync to latest

Pin all seven fastapi_rust workspace crates (fastapi, fastapi-core,
fastapi-http, fastapi-router, fastapi-macros, fastapi-openapi,
fastapi-output) to rev 9fe499e to prevent branch drift and ensure
reproducible builds across all build environments and agents.

Update asupersync pin from f9098d7 to c7c15f6 across all three patch
sections (crates-io, fastmcp_rust, fastapi_rust) to pick up upstream
macOS kqueue fixes for filesystem event handling.

Cargo.lock updated to reflect the resolved dependency graph with
the new pinned revisions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
